title: Federal infrastructure funds will support Alaska ocean observing
summary: PRESS RELEASE CONTACT: Alice Bailey, Director of Outreach, Alaska Ocean Observing System, 907-328-8383, bailey@aoos.org Critical equipment monitoring Alaska’s changing ocean will soon be replaced and enhanced with funds from the recently passed Bipartisan Infrastructure Law .
